titleStmt.title: Letter from Fellow & Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland to the Registrar of Sir Patrick Dun's Hospital, 19 October 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Fellow and Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland (RCPI) to the registrar at St. Patrick Dun's Hospital in Dublin concerning appointments made at their latest annual meeting.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.persName: Fellow and Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Physicians, Kildare Street, Dublin, Ireland

correspAction.persName: The Registrar of Sir Patrick Dun's Hospital
correspAction.placeName: Sir Patrick Dun's Hospital, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
19th OCTOBER 16 The Registrar,
Sir Patrick Dun's Hospital,
Dublin. Dear Sir, I beg to inform you that at the stated annual
Meeting of the President and Fellows of the Royal College
of Physicians of Ireland held on St. Luke's day, the 18th
inst., the following appointments were made: President : Joseph O' Carroll, M.D., 43 Merrion Square.
Censor & V.-Pres.: H.T. Bewley, M.D., 89 Merrion Square.
" Martin Dempsey, M.D., 35 Merrion Square.
" W.A. Winter, M.D., 17 Fitzwilliam Place.
". Bethel Solomons, M.D., 30 Lower Baggot Street. Yours faithfully,
Fellow & Registrar.
